2254840.name: CUSTOM ORDER MAID 3D2 It’s a Night Magic Lucky Bag Ver.Live!
2254840.description:
CUSTOM ORDER MAID 3D2 It’s a Night Magic Lucky Bag Ver.Live! is a DLC based on the super-popular Japanese custom of selling “lucky bags” during the new year!
Lots of DLCs are available for a limited time at a very reasonable price!
* This product will be available for a limited time until Jan. 9.

Lucky Bag Ver. Live! is packed with DLC featuring maids singing and dancing!

1.mainly priority Dance

The following will be added to the dance mode.

*mainly priority

2.Candy Girl Dance

The following will be added to the dance mode.

*Candy Girl Dance

3.The Tears of Regulus Dance

The following will be added to the dance mode.

The Tears of Regulus Dance

4.Kanotsuku 2・FullSet + Summer Season Costume Set

The following will be added to the edit menu.

*Summer Uniform Set
*Casual Sportswear Set
*Chouette Lingerie
*Kanotsuku 2 - Casual Wear Set
*Kanotsuku 2 - Uniform Set

The following will be added to the dance mode.

*can know two close
